systems.system_notes: Bone-conserving hip resurfacing platform intended for resurfacing arthroplasty rather than stemmed total hip replacement.

trays.tray_notes: The official product materials explicitly link the BIRMINGHAM HIP Resurfacing System Surgical Technique, indicating dedicated operative instrumentation.

components.component_notes: The BHR system is described as a hip resurfacing system built around bone-conserving resurfacing principles.
The BHR system includes the acetabular component that articulates with the femoral resurfacing component.

unresolved_items.raw_text: The official product page links the surgical technique but does not expose a simple public SKU table in the page content used for this pass.
unresolved_items.reason: SKU-level catalogue detail still needs a deeper document pass.
unresolved_items.source_excerpt: Current extraction stays at the implant-family level only.
